Questions extracted from the combined PDF. Source tabs filter by file; green and blue tabs show highlighted questions where available. Game Boy Part 2 has no green/blue tagging, so it opens under All Colors / Unflagged. Some items may be marked “Needs review” when the source text had missing choices or unclear answer extraction.
